title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
overview: Anonymized European credit card transactions from September 2013. Highly unbalanced dataset for anomaly detection and fraud investigation.
usage_code:
import pandas as pd
url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nsethi31/Kaggle-Data-Credit-Card-Fraud-Detection/master/creditcard.csv'
df = pd.read_csv(url)
print(f'Fraud Cases: {len(df[df.Class == 1])}')
